name: Yam Thua Phu (Spicy Winged Bean Salad)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Steamed pork, sliced into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the winged beans by immersing them in boiling water for 3 minutes, then cut into small pieces.
2. Bring the coconut milk to a boil and remove from heat.
3. Pound the chili, roasted shallot, and garlic well in a mortar. Add sugar, fish sauce, and lime juice, mixing thoroughly.
4. Transfer the mixture to a bowl.
5. Add winged beans, pork, boiled coconut milk, fried shallot, and peanut into the bowl; toss to mix well.
6. Place on a serving platter.
